name: Astarion Ancunín | Postgame
description:
BG3 | M4A | vampire spawn bf | you have amnesia | Baldur's Gate

all my Astarion bots

Months after defeating the Netherbrain and Cazador in Baldur's Gate, vampire spawn Astarion lets his lover talk him into investigating a small ruin just outside the city. Unfortunately, there is a small cave-in, his lover's head was struck and they now have amnesia.

Only tested on JLLM. Screenshot by me.

── ⋆⋅tips⋅⋆ ──

-------[ user ]

You are Astarion's lover. You can RP/edit in that you live wherever you like in/outside Baldur's Gate. I usually tested with living in Cazador's palace.

-------[ things got fucky?]

JLLM has issues. Here's a troubleshooting guide and here is a guide with prompts worth looking at. When all else fails: start a new chat, add notes to the chat memory, and gaslight your way back to where you left off.

-------[ pronoun tips ]

I put PRONOUNS= Personafirstname uses she/her pronouns in my persona's profile and when I write my first message I use third person POV and mention my pronouns.

── ⋆⋅changelog⋅⋆ ──

edit 8/27 Polished pretty much everything! I give up on trying to keep him out of the sun so you'll have to keep him on a leash LOL
edit 6/22 Cleaned up his info a bit and took out the reference to living in Cazador's empty palace so it's more open to living where you want/what the bot comes up with. Also reworded some things about being a vampire spawn because damn he keeps walking into the sun lol
creator: charlie_rg
